recommendations.title: The Big Short
recommendations.overview: The men who made millions from a global economic meltdown.

recommendations.title: Anchorman: The Legend of Ron Burgundy
recommendations.overview: It's the 1970s and San Diego anchorman Ron Burgundy is the top dog in local TV, but that's all about to change when ambitious reporter Veronica Corningstone arrives as a new employee at his station.

recommendations.title: Anchorman 2: The Legend Continues
recommendations.overview: With the 70s behind him, San Diego's top rated newsman, Ron Burgundy, returns to take New York's first 24-hour news channel by storm.

recommendations.title: Don't Look Up
recommendations.overview: Two astronomers go on a media tour to warn humankind of a planet-killing comet hurtling toward Earth. The response from a distracted world: Meh.

recommendations.title: Vice

recommendations.title: Step Brothers

recommendations.title: The Other Guys

recommendations.title: Moxie
recommendations.overview: Inspired by her mom's rebellious past and a confident new friend, a shy 16-year-old publishes an anonymous zine calling out sexism at her school.

recommendations.title: Wine Country
recommendations.overview: A group of friends head to the land of oaky Chardonnays and big, bold Cabernet Sauvignons for one member of the squad’s 50th birthday party.
